overview.short: Sinhagad (also known as the Lion's Fort) is an ancient hill fortress located at around 28 kilometres southwest of the city of Pune, India.
overview.description: Sinhagad (also known as the Lion's Fort) is an ancient hill fortress located at around 28 kilometres southwest of the city of Pune, India. Previously known as Kondhana, the fort has been the site of many battles, most notably the Battle of Sinhagad in 1670. The fort is a popular weekend destination for the residents of Pune. A road directly leads up to the summit of the fort.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Donje, Maharashtra
topPlaces.description: Donje is a village in the Haveli taluka of Pune district in Maharashtra State, India. Tanaji Malusare Path (Sinhagad Road), which starts at Sarasbaug junction, terminates at Sinhagad Fort or Paitha at Donje village.

topPlaces.name: Zapurza Museum of Art & Culture
topPlaces.description: Zapurza Museum of Art & Culture is a museum in Kudje village, 25 kilometers from the city of Pune in Maharashtra, India. it opened to the public in May 2022.

topPlaces.name: National Defence Academy (India)
topPlaces.description: The National Defence Academy (NDA) is the joint defence academy of the Indian Armed Forces. Here, cadets of the Indian Army, the Indian Navy, and the Indian Air Force train together before they go on to their respective service academies for further pre-commission training.

items.note: Donje is a village in the Haveli taluka of Pune district in Maharashtra State, India. Tanaji Malusare Path (Sinhagad Road), which starts at Sarasbaug junction, terminates at Sinhagad Fort or Paitha at Donje village.
Zapurza Museum of Art & Culture is a museum in Kudje village, 25 kilometers from the city of Pune in Maharashtra, India. it opened to the public in May 2022.

The National Defence Academy (NDA) is the joint defence academy of the Indian Armed Forces. Here, cadets of the Indian Army, the Indian Navy, and the Indian Air Force train together before they go on to their respective service academies for further pre-commission training.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sinhagad?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sinhagad is Mar – Jun, Sep – Nov. Summers are 15–28°C and winters are 2–16°C.

The nearest airport is Pune Airport (30 km) and the nearest railway station is Pune Junction (22 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sinhagad?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sinhagad at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sinhagad?
faq.a: Stays in Sinhagad start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sinhagad?
faq.a: The top attractions are Donje, Maharashtra, Zapurza Museum of Art & Culture, National Defence Academy (India).
